message: Fixture state from the isolated Task-0009 validation lane.

tasks.title: Build the committed-work Tasks tab
tasks.meaning_summary: Make running and queued orchestration work visible without markdown hunting.
tasks.why: The dashboard needs a humane committed-work cockpit for monitoring task state and opening the right live context.

state_envelope.state_summary: The implementation plan was approved and the next step is frontend work.
state_envelope.next_expected_event: Implement the read-only Tasks tab surface.

attention.attention_reason: The task is at a human-approved implementation transition.

block_reasons.summary: The current single task leader already owns implementation.

tasks.title: Backend durable execution state and run controls
tasks.meaning_summary: Expose task/run readback, deep context, and bounded backend actions for orchestration.
tasks.why: The frontend must consume backend truth for run state, Pause availability, and live-context targets.

state_envelope.state_summary: Backend readback and control contracts are available.
state_envelope.next_expected_event: Frontend Tasks tab consumes the backend contract.

block_reasons.summary: The backend task is already complete.

tasks.title: Promotion contract for reviewed work
tasks.meaning_summary: Connect reviewed work to committed task provenance after promotion.
tasks.why: Promoted work should appear in Tasks only after it is durable committed work.

state_envelope.state_summary: Task is ready to dispatch after promotion.
state_envelope.next_expected_event: Dispatch when the backend says a run can start.

tasks.title: Unpromoted idea that must stay off Tasks
tasks.meaning_summary: This fixture row proves candidate filtering.
